title: Escort livestock during export
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Escort livestock during export demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out administration requirements

pcs.text: Obtain and clarify details of the livestock to be exported from the exporter or producer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and clarify details of the livestock to be exported from the exporter or producer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and clarify details of the livestock to be exported from the exporter or producer.

pcs.text: Establish effective communication links between all parties to the consignment and relevant organisations or agencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish effective communication links between all parties to the consignment and relevant organisations or agencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish effective communication links between all parties to the consignment and relevant organisations or agencies.

pcs.text: Investigate and verify specific details of the vessel or aircraft to facilitate loading and transit operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and verify specific details of the vessel or aircraft to facilitate loading and transit operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and verify specific details of the vessel or aircraft to facilitate loading and transit operations.

pcs.text: Complete required certification, permit and invoicing arrangements according to exporter requirements and relevant legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete required certification, permit and invoicing arrangements according to exporter requirements and relevant legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete required certification, permit and invoicing arrangements according to exporter requirements and relevant legislation.

pcs.text: Estimate nutritional and veterinary requirements and order required quantities according to exporter directions, industry standards and load specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate nutritional and veterinary requirements and order required quantities according to exporter directions, industry standards and load specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate nutritional and veterinary requirements and order required quantities according to exporter directions, industry standards and load specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out administration requirements

elements.title: Prepare for livestock to be loaded

pcs.text: Comply with workplace health and safety policies and procedures, including selection of appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with workplace health and safety policies and procedures, including selection of appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with workplace health and safety policies and procedures, including selection of appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Comply with animal welfare and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with animal welfare and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with animal welfare and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Establish communication lines with on-board personnel for the voyage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish communication lines with on-board personnel for the voyage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish communication lines with on-board personnel for the voyage.

pcs.text: Review exporter instructions according to loading criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review exporter instructions according to loading criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review exporter instructions according to loading criteria.

pcs.text: Identify appropriate infrastructure for loading
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate infrastructure for loading?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate infrastructure for loading.

pcs.text: Perform risk analysis for loading and recommend preventative measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform risk analysis for loading and recommend preventative measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform risk analysis for loading and recommend preventative measures.

pcs.text: Identify on-board loading resources and personnel requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify on-board loading resources and personnel requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify on-board loading resources and personnel requirements.

pcs.text: Check and ensure all on-board equipment is in working condition, including veterinary kit and euthanasia equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and ensure all on-board equipment is in working condition, including veterinary kit and euthanasia equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and ensure all on-board equipment is in working condition, including veterinary kit and euthanasia equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for livestock to be loaded

elements.title: Load and accompany livestock on transport

pcs.text: Comply with workplace health and safety policies and procedures, and animal welfare, biosecurity and environment requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with workplace health and safety policies and procedures, and animal welfare, biosecurity and environment requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with workplace health and safety policies and procedures, and animal welfare, biosecurity and environment requirements.

pcs.text: Load and secure livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environment and exporter requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load and secure livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environment and exporter requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load and secure livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environment and exporter requirements.

pcs.text: Check and verify loading densities and conditions according to loading plan and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and verify loading densities and conditions according to loading plan and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and verify loading densities and conditions according to loading plan and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and record water and feed provision to livestock and report any abnormalities or variance from feed budgets to the appropriate party
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and record water and feed provision to livestock and report any abnormalities or variance from feed budgets to the appropriate party?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and record water and feed provision to livestock and report any abnormalities or variance from feed budgets to the appropriate party.

pcs.text: Carry out regular observation of all livestock to ensure timely and appropriate responses to changes in condition, feed and water intake, or incidence of disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out regular observation of all livestock to ensure timely and appropriate responses to changes in condition, feed and water intake, or incidence of disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out regular observation of all livestock to ensure timely and appropriate responses to changes in condition, feed and water intake, or incidence of disease.

pcs.text: Deal humanely with injured or diseased livestock according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environment and customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deal humanely with injured or diseased livestock according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environment and customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deal humanely with injured or diseased livestock according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environment and customer requirements.

pcs.text: Complete reports according to shipping or airline company requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete reports according to shipping or airline company requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete reports according to shipping or airline company requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Load and accompany livestock on transport

elements.title: Complete post-shipment procedures

pcs.text: Establish unloading strategies including timing, health checks and documentation in consultation with the carrier senior officer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish unloading strategies including timing, health checks and documentation in consultation with the carrier senior officer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish unloading strategies including timing, health checks and documentation in consultation with the carrier senior officer.

pcs.text: Complete pen cleaning and other established pre-unloading procedures prior to entering port
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete pen cleaning and other established pre-unloading procedures prior to entering port?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete pen cleaning and other established pre-unloading procedures prior to entering port.

pcs.text: Unload animals using good stock handling techniques, and appropriate equipment and facilities according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environmental and exporter requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unload animals using good stock handling techniques, and appropriate equipment and facilities according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environmental and exporter requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload animals using good stock handling techniques, and appropriate equipment and facilities according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity, environmental and exporter requirements.

pcs.text: Identify specific animal requirements at unloading and obtain supplies to meet consignment needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify specific animal requirements at unloading and obtain supplies to meet consignment needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify specific animal requirements at unloading and obtain supplies to meet consignment needs.

pcs.text: Complete end of voyage reports and required documentation according to exporter requirements, shipping or airline company requirements, government legislation, and customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete end of voyage reports and required documentation according to exporter requirements, shipping or airline company requirements, government legislation, and customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete end of voyage reports and required documentation according to exporter requirements, shipping or airline company requirements, government legislation, and customer requirements.

pcs.text: Undertake post-transport checks according to exporter and customer requirements, and shipping or airline company requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake post-transport checks according to exporter and customer requirements, and shipping or airline company requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake post-transport checks according to exporter and customer requirements, and shipping or airline company requirements.
